channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Regine Velasquez's Notable Performance of 'Tanging Mahal' on ASAP XP

item.description: The article discusses how alcohol use, sexual violence, and other social factors contribute to HIV risk among young women in South Africa. Research highlights that hazardous drinking is common and lin...

item.title: Canada's FM Anand to Strengthen Bilateral Ties with Pakistan During Official Visit
item.description: Canadian Foreign Minister Anita Anand will visit Pakistan at the invitation of Deputy Prime Minister Ishaq Dar, marking her first official trip to the country since taking office. The visit, scheduled...

item.title: Matty Healy and Gabbriette Bechtel wed at Hollywood Hills mansion with celebrity guests
item.description: Matty Healy, frontman of The 1975, and model Gabbriette Bechtel married in a private ceremony at Castillo del Lago, Madonna’s former Los Angeles estate. The event, held on July 18, 2026, featured high...

item.title: The battle over public access to Italian coastal areas

item.title: Journalist's Father Imprisoned Over Recruitment Scandal Linked to State House
item.description: Baba Kimani, father of journalist Kimani Mbugua, is in prison after being implicated in a recruitment scam linked to State House officials. According to TikToker Okumu, Baba Kimani was asked to mobili...

item.title: PPP's Bilawal Aims for Stronger Show in AJK Elections as Party Seeks Government Formation
item.description: PPP Chairman Bilawal Bhutto-Zardari expressed hopes of forming a government in Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK) during a public rally in Kotli, emphasizing the need for improved election results compared ...

item.title: Astronomers Confirm Atmosphere on Rocky Exoplanet in a Habitable Zone
item.description: Astronomers have confirmed that the rocky exoplanet LHS 1140 b possesses an atmosphere while orbiting within the habitable zone of its host star, making it one of the most promising Earth-like worlds ...

item.title: Wildfire Evacuees Share Harrowing Experiences in Northwestern Ontario
item.description: Over 350 people from Whitesand First Nation and neighboring communities have evacuated due to wildfires burning across northern Ontario. Retired firefighter Daniel Nodin warned residents of the danger...

item.title: Top Cartoons of July 20, 2026: Political Satire and Commentary

item.title: Delhi High Court Supports Government's Action to Shift Fasting Activist Sonam Wangchuk to Safdarjung Hospital
item.description: The Delhi High Court has rejected a plea by Gitanjali Angmo, wife of climate activist Sonam Wangchuk, seeking his transfer from Safdarjung Hospital to a private facility like Medanta. The court observ...

item.title: Koeberg nuclear plant confirms no public risk after routine safety checks
